Helijet Charters : Eurocopter A-Star

From bases at Haida Gwaii-Sandspit and Prince Rupert-Seal Cove, our fleet of Eurocopter A-Star helicopters and experienced local pilots will get you where you need to be along British Columbia’s North Coast or further into the province’s interior.

For additional information on helicopter charters or a quotation please contact us at: charters[at]helijet.to.com or call 1-800-987-4354 (between 6 a.m. and 7 p.m. Eurocopter AS350B2*

*available only in Haida Gwaii/Prince Rupert bases

  • Passengers – 5
  • Cabin Volume – 105.94 cu ft
  • Payload (w/full fuel) – 1040 lbs
  • Payload (w/ one hour fuel) – 1500 lbs
  • Nominal Sling Load – 2200 lbs
  • Cruise Speed – 120 knots
  • Max Range (w/Full Fuel) – 320 nautical miles
  • Fuel Capacity – 540 litres
  • Endurance – 2.7 hours (with VFR reserve)
  • Fuel Consumption – 172 litres per hour
  • Exterior Cargo Basket available
  • Air medical (Lifeport) single patient transfer capable

Eurocopter AS350B3*

*available only in Haida Gwaii/Prince Rupert

  • Passengers – 5
  • Cabin Volume – 105.94 cu ft
  • Payload (w/full fuel) – 1000 lbs Internal
  • Payload (w/ one hour fuel) – 1500 lbs Internal
  • External Load – 2500 lbs
  • Cruise Speed – 130 knots
  • Max Range (w/Full Fuel) – 320 nautical miles
  • Fuel Capacity – 540 litres
  • Endurance – 2.5 hours (with VFR reserve)
  • Fuel Consumption – 200 litres per hour
  • Exterior Cargo Basket available
  • Air medical (Lifeport) single patient transfer capable
